scientist.name: scientist
scientist.description: Scientific research suite with 195 specialized sub-skills. Covers literature review, experimental design, data analysis, modeling, bioinformatics, cheminformatics, visualization, and publication-ready reporting. Requires file-first outputs, verification gates, and timestamped execution logging.

scientist/scientific-academic-writing.name: scientific-academic-writing
scientist/scientific-academic-writing.description: Academic paper writing skill. Supports IMRaD standard, Nature/Science, ACS, IEEE, and Elsevier journal formats with section design, writing patterns, and citation management.

scientist/scientific-active-learning.name: scientific-active-learning
scientist/scientific-active-learning.description: Active learning skill. Uncertainty sampling, Query-by-Committee, expected model change, pool-based/stream-based, batch active learning, GP-based active learning with ARD-RBF kernel, dimension-adaptive convergence, stopping criteria, and model improvement pipeline.

scientist/scientific-adaptive-experiment.name: scientific-adaptive-experiments
scientist/scientific-adaptive-experiment.description: Adaptive experiment design skill. Sequential experiment optimization, Bayesian optimization, multi-armed bandit, response-adaptive randomization, and interim analysis for efficient experimental workflows.

scientist/scientific-admet-pharmacokinet.name: scientific-admet-pharmacokinetics
scientist/scientific-admet-pharmacokinet.description: ADMET and pharmacokinetics prediction skill. Absorption, Distribution, Metabolism, Excretion, Toxicity modeling with RDKit, DeepChem, and PK/PD simulation pipelines.

scientist/scientific-advanced-imaging.name: scientific-advanced-imaging
scientist/scientific-advanced-imaging.description: Advanced imaging analysis skill. Microscopy image processing, segmentation, super-resolution, 3D reconstruction, fluorescence quantification, and multi-channel analysis pipelines.

scientist/scientific-advanced-visualizat.name: scientific-advanced-visualization
scientist/scientific-advanced-visualizat.description: Advanced scientific visualization skill. Multi-panel figures, 3D plots, interactive dashboards, heatmaps, volcano plots, Manhattan plots, and publication-quality figure generation.

scientist/scientific-alphafold-structure.name: scientific-alphafold-structures
scientist/scientific-alphafold-structure.description: AlphaFold structure prediction skill. Protein structure retrieval from AlphaFold DB, pLDDT confidence scoring, structural alignment, and downstream structural analysis.

scientist/scientific-anomaly-detection.name: scientific-anomaly-detection
scientist/scientific-anomaly-detection.description: Anomaly detection skill. Isolation Forest, LOF, One-Class SVM, autoencoders, statistical control charts, time-series anomaly detection, and multivariate outlier analysis.

scientist/scientific-arrayexpress-expres.name: scientific-arrayexpress-expression
scientist/scientific-arrayexpress-expres.description: ArrayExpress gene expression skill. Microarray and RNA-seq data retrieval from ArrayExpress/BioStudies, normalization, differential expression, and cross-study comparison.

scientist/scientific-audit-report.name: scientific-audit-report
scientist/scientific-audit-report.description: Research audit report skill. Systematic quality assessment of experimental designs, statistical analyses, reproducibility, and reporting standards compliance.

scientist/scientific-automl.name: scientific-automl
scientist/scientific-automl.description: AutoML pipeline skill. Optuna hyperparameter optimization, FLAML fast AutoML, Auto-sklearn model selection, NAS, automated feature engineering, and model comparison pipelines.

scientist/scientific-bayesian-statistics.name: scientific-bayesian-statistics
scientist/scientific-bayesian-statistics.description: Bayesian statistics skill. PyMC/Stan/ArviZ-based Bayesian regression, hierarchical models, MCMC sampling, Bayesian optimization, posterior predictive checks, and model comparison.

scientist/scientific-biobank-cohort.name: scientific-biobank-cohort
scientist/scientific-biobank-cohort.description: Biobank cohort analysis skill. UK Biobank, All of Us, and large-scale cohort data integration, phenotype extraction, population stratification, and epidemiological analysis pipelines.

scientist/scientific-bioinformatics.name: scientific-bioinformatics
scientist/scientific-bioinformatics.description: Bioinformatics workflow skill. Sequence alignment, variant calling, genome assembly, annotation, phylogenetic analysis, and multi-omics data integration pipelines.

scientist/scientific-biomedical-pubtator.name: scientific-biomedical-pubtator
scientist/scientific-biomedical-pubtator.description: PubTator biomedical text mining skill. Named entity recognition for genes, diseases, chemicals, mutations, and species from PubMed literature using PubTator3 API.

scientist/scientific-biosignal-processin.name: scientific-biosignal-processing
scientist/scientific-biosignal-processin.description: Biosignal processing skill. EEG, ECG, EMG signal processing with filtering, spectral analysis, wavelet transforms, and time-frequency analysis pipelines.

scientist/scientific-biothings-idmapping.name: scientific-biothings-idmapping
scientist/scientific-biothings-idmapping.description: BioThings ID mapping skill. Gene/variant/chemical/disease identifier conversion using MyGene.info, MyVariant.info, and MyChem.info APIs.

scientist/scientific-cancer-genomics.name: scientific-cancer-genomics
scientist/scientific-cancer-genomics.description: Cancer genomics skill. Somatic mutation analysis, copy number variation, tumor mutational burden, microsatellite instability, driver gene identification, and oncological pathway analysis.

scientist/scientific-causal-inference.name: scientific-causal-inference
scientist/scientific-causal-inference.description: Causal inference skill. DoWhy/EconML-based causal analysis, propensity score matching, instrumental variables, difference-in-differences, regression discontinuity, and DAG-based causal reasoning.

scientist/scientific-causal-ml.name: scientific-causal-ml
scientist/scientific-causal-ml.description: Causal machine learning skill. Heterogeneous treatment effects, CATE estimation, causal forests, meta-learners (S/T/X), uplift modeling, and policy optimization.

scientist/scientific-cell-line-resources.name: scientific-cell-line-resources
scientist/scientific-cell-line-resources.description: Cell line resource skill. Cellosaurus, ATCC, DepMap cell line data retrieval, cell line authentication, STR profiling, and cross-reference between cell line databases.

scientist/scientific-cellxgene-census.name: scientific-cellxgene-census
scientist/scientific-cellxgene-census.description: CellxGene Census skill. Single-cell RNA-seq data retrieval from CZ CELLxGENE, cell type annotation, cross-dataset comparison, and gene expression atlas queries.

scientist/scientific-chembl-assay-mining.name: scientific-chembl-assay-mining
scientist/scientific-chembl-assay-mining.description: ChEMBL assay mining skill. Bioactivity data retrieval, target-compound mapping, SAR analysis, assay type classification, and compound potency comparison from ChEMBL database.

scientist/scientific-cheminformatics.name: scientific-cheminformatics
scientist/scientific-cheminformatics.description: Cheminformatics skill. RDKit molecular property calculation, SMILES/InChI handling, molecular fingerprints, substructure search, chemical similarity, and ADMET prediction.

scientist/scientific-citation-checker.name: scientific-citation-checker
scientist/scientific-citation-checker.description: Citation checking skill. Reference validation, DOI verification, retraction detection, citation consistency checking, and bibliography formatting compliance.

scientist/scientific-civic-evidence.name: scientific-civic-evidence
scientist/scientific-civic-evidence.description: CIViC clinical interpretation skill. Clinical Interpretations of Variants in Cancer (CIViC) database queries, evidence level assessment, and clinical actionability evaluation.

scientist/scientific-clingen-curation.name: scientific-clingen-curation
scientist/scientific-clingen-curation.description: ClinGen curation skill. Gene-disease validity classification, variant pathogenicity assessment, dosage sensitivity, and clinical actionability curation using ClinGen resources.

scientist/scientific-clinical-decision-s.name: scientific-clinical-decision-support
scientist/scientific-clinical-decision-s.description: Clinical decision support skill. Evidence-based clinical guidelines, risk scoring models, diagnostic algorithms, treatment pathway selection, and clinical prediction rules.

scientist/scientific-clinical-nlp.name: scientific-clinical-nlp
scientist/scientific-clinical-nlp.description: Clinical NLP skill. MedSpaCy/cTAKES/scispaCy-based clinical text NER, section detection, negation detection, ICD-10/SNOMED-CT entity linking, and de-identification pipelines.

scientist/scientific-clinical-pharmacolo.name: scientific-clinical-pharmacology
scientist/scientific-clinical-pharmacolo.description: Clinical pharmacology skill. Dose-response modeling, PK/PD simulation, drug interaction prediction, therapeutic drug monitoring, and population pharmacokinetics.

scientist/scientific-clinical-reporting.name: scientific-clinical-reporting
scientist/scientific-clinical-reporting.description: Clinical reporting skill. Structured clinical study reports, CONSORT/STROBE compliance, patient demographics tables, efficacy/safety summaries, and regulatory submission formatting.

scientist/scientific-clinical-standards.name: scientific-clinical-standards
scientist/scientific-clinical-standards.description: Clinical standards skill. CDISC SDTM/ADaM data standards, HL7 FHIR resource mapping, LOINC/SNOMED coding, and regulatory data submission format compliance.

scientist/scientific-clinical-trials-ana.name: scientific-clinical-trials-analytics
scientist/scientific-clinical-trials-ana.description: Clinical trials analytics skill. Trial design comparison, enrollment simulation, interim analysis, survival analysis, and adverse event signal detection from ClinicalTrials.gov data.

scientist/scientific-compound-screening.name: scientific-compound-screening
scientist/scientific-compound-screening.description: Compound screening skill. High-throughput screening data analysis, hit identification, dose-response curve fitting, Z-factor calculation, and compound library management.

scientist/scientific-computational-mater.name: scientific-computational-materials
scientist/scientific-computational-mater.description: Computational materials science skill. DFT calculations, molecular dynamics for materials, crystal structure prediction, band structure analysis, and materials property prediction.

scientist/scientific-crispr-design.name: scientific-crispr-design
scientist/scientific-crispr-design.description: CRISPR design skill. Guide RNA design, off-target analysis, CRISPR screen analysis, gene knockout/knock-in design, and editing efficiency prediction.

scientist/scientific-critical-review.name: scientific-critical-review
scientist/scientific-critical-review.description: Critical review skill. Systematic assessment of research quality, experimental rigor evaluation, statistical claim verification, and comprehensive peer review analysis.

scientist/scientific-crossref-metadata.name: scientific-crossref-metadata
scientist/scientific-crossref-metadata.description: Crossref metadata skill. Scholarly publication metadata retrieval, citation count tracking, DOI resolution, funder information extraction, and bibliometric analysis via Crossref API.

scientist/scientific-data-preprocessing.name: scientific-data-preprocessing
scientist/scientific-data-preprocessing.description: Data preprocessing skill. Missing value imputation, outlier detection, normalization, feature scaling, encoding, and data cleaning pipelines for scientific datasets.

scientist/scientific-data-profiling.name: scientific-data-profiling
scientist/scientific-data-profiling.description: Data profiling skill. Automated dataset characterization, distribution analysis, data quality metrics, schema inference, and statistical summary generation.

scientist/scientific-data-simulation.name: scientific-data-simulation
scientist/scientific-data-simulation.description: Data simulation skill. Synthetic data generation, Monte Carlo simulation, bootstrap resampling, parametric/non-parametric simulation, and power analysis via simulation.

scientist/scientific-data-submission.name: scientific-data-submission
scientist/scientific-data-submission.description: Data submission skill. GEO/SRA/ENA/DDBJ data deposition, metadata preparation, compliance with FAIR principles, and repository-specific format conversion.

scientist/scientific-deep-chemistry.name: scientific-deep-chemistry
scientist/scientific-deep-chemistry.description: Deep chemistry skill. Graph neural networks for molecular property prediction, molecular generation with VAE/GAN, reaction prediction, and retrosynthesis planning.

scientist/scientific-deep-learning.name: scientific-deep-learning
scientist/scientific-deep-learning.description: Deep learning skill. PyTorch/TensorFlow model building, CNN/RNN/Transformer architectures, training optimization, GPU acceleration, and deep learning experiment management.

scientist/scientific-deep-research.name: scientific-deep-research
scientist/scientific-deep-research.description: Deep research skill. Iterative literature research following the SHIKIGAMI WebResearcher paradigm (Think→Report→Action cycle) with academic database search, evidence hierarchy assessment, source tracking, and hallucination prevention.

scientist/scientific-depmap-dependencies.name: scientific-depmap-dependencies
scientist/scientific-depmap-dependencies.description: DepMap dependency skill. Cancer cell line dependency data from DepMap/CRISPR screens, gene essentiality scoring, and functional genomics analysis.

scientist/scientific-disease-research.name: scientific-disease-research
scientist/scientific-disease-research.description: Disease research skill. Disease ontology queries, phenotype-genotype associations, clinical feature extraction, and disease mechanism pathway analysis.

scientist/scientific-doe.name: scientific-doe
scientist/scientific-doe.description: Design of Experiments (DOE) skill. Factorial design, response surface methodology, Latin hypercube sampling with auto-sized pool generation, Taguchi methods, ARD-RBF Bayesian optimization, and optimal experimental design generation.

scientist/scientific-drug-repurposing.name: scientific-drug-repurposing
scientist/scientific-drug-repurposing.description: Drug repurposing skill. Computational drug repositioning, network-based prediction, molecular similarity-based repurposing, and clinical trial evidence mining for new indications.

scientist/scientific-drug-target-profili.name: scientific-drug-target-profiling
scientist/scientific-drug-target-profili.description: Drug-target profiling skill. Target identification, binding affinity prediction, selectivity profiling, polypharmacology analysis, and target deconvolution pipelines.

scientist/scientific-drugbank-resources.name: scientific-drugbank-resources
scientist/scientific-drugbank-resources.description: DrugBank resource skill. Drug information retrieval, drug-target interactions, drug-drug interactions, pharmacological classifications, and clinical indication mapping.

scientist/scientific-ebi-databases.name: scientific-ebi-databases
scientist/scientific-ebi-databases.description: EBI databases skill. EMBL-EBI resource integration including UniProt, PDB, ChEMBL, Ensembl, InterPro, and cross-database querying strategies.

scientist/scientific-eda-correlation.name: scientific-eda-correlation
scientist/scientific-eda-correlation.description: EDA and correlation analysis skill. Exploratory data analysis, correlation matrices, distribution visualization, multivariate analysis, and automated EDA report generation.

scientist/scientific-encode-screen.name: scientific-encode-screen
scientist/scientific-encode-screen.description: ENCODE screen skill. ENCODE project data access, regulatory element annotation, epigenomic data analysis, and functional genomics screen result interpretation.

scientist/scientific-ensembl-genomics.name: scientific-ensembl-genomics
scientist/scientific-ensembl-genomics.description: Ensembl genomics skill. Genome browser API queries, gene annotation retrieval, variant effect prediction, comparative genomics, and regulatory feature mapping via Ensembl REST API.

scientist/scientific-ensemble-methods.name: scientific-ensemble-methods
scientist/scientific-ensemble-methods.description: Ensemble methods skill. Random forests, gradient boosting (XGBoost/LightGBM/CatBoost), stacking, blending, voting classifiers, and ensemble model interpretation.

scientist/scientific-environmental-ecolo.name: scientific-environmental-ecology
scientist/scientific-environmental-ecolo.description: Environmental ecology skill. Biodiversity analysis, species distribution modeling, ecological niche analysis, community ecology metrics, and conservation assessment pipelines.

scientist/scientific-environmental-geoda.name: scientific-environmental-geodata
scientist/scientific-environmental-geoda.description: Environmental geodata skill. Satellite imagery analysis, remote sensing data processing, climate data integration, land use classification, and environmental monitoring.

scientist/scientific-epidemiology-public.name: scientific-epidemiology-public-health
scientist/scientific-epidemiology-public.description: Epidemiology and public health skill. Disease surveillance, outbreak analysis, incidence/prevalence estimation, risk factor analysis, and population health metrics.

scientist/scientific-epigenomics-chromat.name: scientific-epigenomics-chromatin
scientist/scientific-epigenomics-chromat.description: Epigenomics and chromatin skill. ChIP-seq/ATAC-seq analysis, histone modification mapping, chromatin accessibility, DNA methylation analysis, and epigenetic regulatory networks.

scientist/scientific-experiment-fork.name: scientific-experiment-fork
scientist/scientific-experiment-fork.description: Experiment forking skill. A/B test branching, experiment versioning, parameter variation management, and parallel experimental workflow orchestration.

scientist/scientific-experiment-template.name: scientific-experiment-template
scientist/scientific-experiment-template.description: Experiment template skill. Standardized experimental protocol generation, reproducible experiment setup, parameter configuration templates, and lab notebook formatting.

scientist/scientific-explainable-ai.name: scientific-explainable-ai
scientist/scientific-explainable-ai.description: Explainable AI skill. SHAP values, LIME explanations, feature importance, partial dependence plots, model-agnostic interpretability, and explanation report generation.

scientist/scientific-expression-comparis.name: scientific-expression-comparison
scientist/scientific-expression-comparis.description: Gene expression comparison skill. Differential expression analysis (DESeq2/edgeR/limma), multi-condition comparison, volcano plots, and enrichment analysis pipelines.

scientist/scientific-feature-importance.name: scientific-feature-importance
scientist/scientific-feature-importance.description: Feature importance skill. Permutation importance, SHAP-based feature ranking, mutual information, recursive feature elimination, and feature selection pipelines.

scientist/scientific-federated-learning.name: scientific-federated-learning
scientist/scientific-federated-learning.description: Federated learning skill. Privacy-preserving distributed model training, federated averaging, differential privacy, secure aggregation, and cross-silo federation.

scientist/scientific-gdc-portal.name: scientific-gdc-portal
scientist/scientific-gdc-portal.description: GDC Portal skill. Genomic Data Commons cancer data retrieval, mutation frequency analysis, clinical-genomic correlation, and multi-project data integration.

scientist/scientific-gene-expression-tra.name: scientific-gene-expression-transcriptomics
scientist/scientific-gene-expression-tra.description: Gene expression and transcriptomics skill. RNA-seq analysis pipeline, gene quantification, isoform analysis, co-expression networks, and transcriptome-wide association.

scientist/scientific-genome-sequence-too.name: scientific-genome-sequence-tools
scientist/scientific-genome-sequence-too.description: Genome sequence tools skill. BLAST searches, multiple sequence alignment, genome annotation, primer design, and sequence manipulation utilities.

scientist/scientific-geo-expression.name: scientific-geo-expression
scientist/scientific-geo-expression.description: GEO expression skill. Gene Expression Omnibus data retrieval, microarray/RNA-seq dataset processing, GEO2R analysis, and cross-platform data normalization.

scientist/scientific-geospatial-analysis.name: scientific-geospatial-analysis
scientist/scientific-geospatial-analysis.description: Geospatial analysis skill. Spatial data processing with GeoPandas, coordinate transformations, spatial statistics, map visualization, and geospatial machine learning.

scientist/scientific-glycomics.name: scientific-glycomics
scientist/scientific-glycomics.description: Glycomics skill. Glycan structure analysis, glycosylation site prediction, glycoproteomics data processing, and carbohydrate database queries.

scientist/scientific-gnomad-variants.name: scientific-gnomad-variants
scientist/scientific-gnomad-variants.description: gnomAD variant skill. Population allele frequency queries, variant filtering, loss-of-function constraint metrics, and clinical variant annotation from gnomAD database.

scientist/scientific-gpu-singlecell.name: scientific-gpu-singlecell
scientist/scientific-gpu-singlecell.description: GPU-accelerated single-cell skill. RAPIDS/cuML-based single-cell analysis, GPU-accelerated dimensionality reduction, clustering, and differential expression on large datasets.

scientist/scientific-grant-writing.name: scientific-grant-writing
scientist/scientific-grant-writing.description: Grant writing skill. Research proposal drafting, specific aims composition, budget justification, significance/innovation statements, and funding agency format compliance.

scientist/scientific-graph-neural-networ.name: scientific-graph-neural-networks
scientist/scientific-graph-neural-networ.description: Graph neural networks skill. GNN architectures (GCN/GAT/GraphSAGE), molecular graph learning, knowledge graph embeddings, and graph-level prediction tasks.

scientist/scientific-gtex-tissue-express.name: scientific-gtex-tissue-expression
scientist/scientific-gtex-tissue-express.description: GTEx tissue expression skill. Tissue-specific gene expression queries from GTEx portal, eQTL analysis, cross-tissue comparison, and gene expression variation analysis.

scientist/scientific-gwas-catalog.name: scientific-gwas-catalog
scientist/scientific-gwas-catalog.description: GWAS Catalog skill. Genome-wide association study result queries, trait-variant associations, LD analysis, and polygenic risk score construction from GWAS Catalog data.

scientist/scientific-healthcare-ai.name: scientific-healthcare-ai
scientist/scientific-healthcare-ai.description: Healthcare AI skill. Clinical prediction models, patient risk stratification, medical image classification, electronic health record analysis, and clinical decision support ML.

scientist/scientific-hgnc-nomenclature.name: scientific-hgnc-nomenclature
scientist/scientific-hgnc-nomenclature.description: HGNC nomenclature skill. Official gene symbol resolution, gene name standardization, symbol history tracking, and gene family classification via HGNC database.

scientist/scientific-human-cell-atlas.name: scientific-human-cell-atlas
scientist/scientific-human-cell-atlas.description: Human Cell Atlas skill. HCA data portal queries, cell type reference mapping, organ-specific cell atlases, and single-cell study integration across the Human Cell Atlas project.

scientist/scientific-human-protein-atlas.name: scientific-human-protein-atlas
scientist/scientific-human-protein-atlas.description: Human Protein Atlas skill. Protein expression data retrieval, tissue/cell/pathology atlas queries, subcellular localization, and protein classification from HPA database.

scientist/scientific-hypothesis-pipeline.name: scientific-hypothesis-pipeline
scientist/scientific-hypothesis-pipeline.description: Hypothesis pipeline skill. Structured hypothesis generation, testable prediction formulation, experimental design derivation, and hypothesis-driven research workflow orchestration.

scientist/scientific-icgc-cancer-data.name: scientific-icgc-cancer-data
scientist/scientific-icgc-cancer-data.description: ICGC cancer data skill. International Cancer Genome Consortium data retrieval, pan-cancer mutation analysis, driver mutation identification, and multi-project comparison.

scientist/scientific-image-analysis.name: scientific-image-analysis
scientist/scientific-image-analysis.description: Image analysis skill. Scientific image processing, segmentation, morphological analysis, particle detection, colocalization analysis, and quantitative microscopy pipelines.

scientist/scientific-immunoinformatics.name: scientific-immunoinformatics
scientist/scientific-immunoinformatics.description: Immunoinformatics skill. Epitope prediction, MHC binding analysis, TCR/BCR repertoire analysis, immune cell deconvolution, and vaccine design support.

scientist/scientific-infectious-disease.name: scientific-infectious-disease
scientist/scientific-infectious-disease.description: Infectious disease skill. Pathogen genomics, antimicrobial resistance prediction, epidemiological modeling, phylogenetic tracking, and outbreak analysis pipelines.

scientist/scientific-interactive-dashboa.name: scientific-interactive-dashboard
scientist/scientific-interactive-dashboa.description: Interactive dashboard skill. Streamlit/Plotly Dash scientific dashboard creation, real-time data visualization, parameter exploration interfaces, and research result presentation.

scientist/scientific-lab-automation.name: scientific-lab-automation
scientist/scientific-lab-automation.description: Lab automation skill. Laboratory workflow automation, instrument control scripting, sample tracking, experimental protocol automation, and LIMS integration.

scientist/scientific-lab-data-management.name: scientific-lab-data-management
scientist/scientific-lab-data-management.description: Lab data management skill. Research data organization, metadata management, electronic lab notebook integration, data versioning, and FAIR data compliance.

scientist/scientific-latex-export.name: scientific-latex-export
scientist/scientific-latex-export.description: LaTeX export skill. Markdown-to-LaTeX conversion, journal-specific LaTeX template generation, bibliography management, and publication-ready PDF compilation.

scientist/scientific-latex-formatter.name: scientific-latex-formatter
scientist/scientific-latex-formatter.description: LaTeX formatter skill. LaTeX document formatting, equation typesetting, table formatting, figure placement optimization, and style file customization.

scientist/scientific-lipidomics.name: scientific-lipidomics
scientist/scientific-lipidomics.description: Lipidomics skill. Lipid species identification, quantification, lipid class profiling, lipidome-wide association, and lipidomics pathway analysis.

scientist/scientific-literature-search.name: scientific-literature-search
scientist/scientific-literature-search.description: Literature search skill. PubMed/Scopus/Web of Science search strategy design, systematic search query construction, citation screening, and reference manager integration.

scientist/scientific-marine-ecology.name: scientific-marine-ecology
scientist/scientific-marine-ecology.description: Marine ecology skill. Ocean biodiversity analysis, marine species distribution modeling, fisheries data analysis, coral reef assessment, and marine environmental monitoring.

scientist/scientific-materials-character.name: scientific-materials-characterization
scientist/scientific-materials-character.description: Materials characterization skill. XRD pattern analysis, SEM/TEM image processing, spectroscopy data analysis (XPS/FTIR/Raman), and materials property database queries.

scientist/scientific-md-simulation.name: scientific-md-simulation
scientist/scientific-md-simulation.description: Molecular dynamics simulation skill. GROMACS/OpenMM simulation setup, force field selection, trajectory analysis, free energy calculations, and enhanced sampling methods.

scientist/scientific-medical-imaging.name: scientific-medical-imaging
scientist/scientific-medical-imaging.description: Medical imaging skill. DICOM processing, image segmentation (U-Net), classification, registration, radiomics feature extraction, and clinical imaging pipeline development.

scientist/scientific-meta-analysis.name: scientific-meta-analysis
scientist/scientific-meta-analysis.description: Meta-analysis skill. Effect size calculation, random/fixed effects models, heterogeneity assessment (I², Q-test), forest plots, funnel plots, and publication bias analysis.

scientist/scientific-metabolic-atlas.name: scientific-metabolic-atlas
scientist/scientific-metabolic-atlas.description: Metabolic atlas skill. Genome-scale metabolic model queries, metabolic pathway visualization, flux balance analysis results, and cross-species metabolic comparison.

scientist/scientific-metabolic-flux.name: scientific-metabolic-flux
scientist/scientific-metabolic-flux.description: Metabolic flux analysis skill. ¹³C metabolic flux analysis, flux balance analysis, flux variability analysis, and metabolic network constraint-based modeling.

scientist/scientific-metabolic-modeling.name: scientific-metabolic-modeling
scientist/scientific-metabolic-modeling.description: Metabolic modeling skill. Constraint-based metabolic modeling (COBRApy), genome-scale model construction, gene knockout simulation, and metabolic engineering predictions.

scientist/scientific-metabolomics.name: scientific-metabolomics
scientist/scientific-metabolomics.description: Metabolomics skill. LC-MS/GC-MS data processing, metabolite identification, pathway mapping, biomarker discovery, and metabolomics statistical analysis pipelines.

scientist/scientific-metabolomics-databa.name: scientific-metabolomics-databases
scientist/scientific-metabolomics-databa.description: Metabolomics databases skill. HMDB/METLIN/MassBank database queries, metabolite annotation, spectral library matching, and cross-database metabolite identification.

scientist/scientific-metabolomics-networ.name: scientific-metabolomics-network
scientist/scientific-metabolomics-networ.description: Metabolomics network skill. Metabolite correlation networks, pathway-level network analysis, metabolite-gene interaction mapping, and multi-omics network integration.

scientist/scientific-metagenome-assemble.name: scientific-metagenome-assembled-genomes
scientist/scientific-metagenome-assemble.description: Metagenome-assembled genomes (MAG) skill. Metagenomic binning, genome quality assessment (CheckM), taxonomic classification, and functional annotation of MAGs.

scientist/scientific-microbiome-metageno.name: scientific-microbiome-metagenomics
scientist/scientific-microbiome-metageno.description: Microbiome and metagenomics skill. 16S rRNA analysis, shotgun metagenomics, diversity metrics, taxonomic profiling, functional metagenomics, and microbiome association studies.

scientist/scientific-missing-data-analys.name: scientific-missing-data-analysis
scientist/scientific-missing-data-analys.description: Missing data analysis skill. Missing data pattern detection, MCAR/MAR/MNAR classification, multiple imputation (MICE), sensitivity analysis, and missing data reporting.

scientist/scientific-ml-classification.name: scientific-ml-classification
scientist/scientific-ml-classification.description: ML classification skill. Binary/multi-class classification, model selection, hyperparameter tuning, cross-validation, metrics evaluation, and classification pipeline orchestration.

scientist/scientific-ml-regression.name: scientific-ml-regression
scientist/scientific-ml-regression.description: ML regression skill. Linear/nonlinear regression, regularization (L1/L2/ElasticNet), polynomial features, cross-validation, and regression diagnostics pipelines.

scientist/scientific-model-monitoring.name: scientific-model-monitoring
scientist/scientific-model-monitoring.description: Model monitoring skill. ML model performance tracking, data drift detection, prediction quality monitoring, model degradation alerts, and A/B test monitoring.

scientist/scientific-model-organism-db.name: scientific-model-organism-db
scientist/scientific-model-organism-db.description: Model organism database skill. FlyBase/WormBase/SGD/ZFIN/MGI queries, ortholog mapping, phenotype data retrieval, and cross-species gene function comparison.

scientist/scientific-molecular-docking.name: scientific-molecular-docking
scientist/scientific-molecular-docking.description: Molecular docking skill. AutoDock Vina/SMINA docking simulations, binding pose prediction, scoring function evaluation, virtual screening, and protein-ligand interaction analysis.

scientist/scientific-monarch-ontology.name: scientific-monarch-ontology
scientist/scientific-monarch-ontology.description: Monarch ontology skill. Monarch Initiative queries for disease-gene associations, phenotype ontology navigation, cross-species phenotype comparison, and knowledge graph exploration.

scientist/scientific-multi-omics.name: scientific-multi-omics
scientist/scientific-multi-omics.description: Multi-omics integration skill. Genomics/transcriptomics/proteomics/metabolomics data integration, multi-omics factor analysis (MOFA), pathway-level integration, and cross-omics correlation.

scientist/scientific-multi-task-learning.name: scientific-multi-task-learning
scientist/scientific-multi-task-learning.description: Multi-task learning skill. Shared representation learning, task-specific heads, gradient balancing, auxiliary task selection, and multi-task model evaluation.

scientist/scientific-nci60-screening.name: scientific-nci60-screening
scientist/scientific-nci60-screening.description: NCI-60 screening skill. NCI-60 cancer cell line panel data analysis, drug sensitivity profiling, COMPARE algorithm, and multi-drug response comparison.

scientist/scientific-network-analysis.name: scientific-network-analysis
scientist/scientific-network-analysis.description: Network analysis skill. NetworkX graph construction, centrality analysis, community detection, network visualization, PPI networks, and correlation network building.

scientist/scientific-network-visualizati.name: scientific-network-visualization
scientist/scientific-network-visualizati.description: Network visualization skill. Interactive network plots (Cytoscape.js/D3/NetworkX), layout algorithms, edge bundling, node clustering visualization, and publication-quality network figures.

scientist/scientific-neural-architecture.name: scientific-neural-architecture-search
scientist/scientific-neural-architecture.description: Neural architecture search (NAS) skill. Architecture space definition, search strategy implementation, performance estimation, and efficient NAS methods (DARTS/ENAS).

scientist/scientific-neuroscience-electr.name: scientific-neuroscience-electrophysiology
scientist/scientific-neuroscience-electr.description: Neuroscience electrophysiology skill. Spike sorting, LFP analysis, neural oscillation characterization, connectivity analysis, and electrophysiology data preprocessing.

scientist/scientific-noncoding-rna.name: scientific-noncoding-rna
scientist/scientific-noncoding-rna.description: Non-coding RNA skill. miRNA target prediction, lncRNA functional annotation, ncRNA expression analysis, small RNA-seq processing, and RNA secondary structure prediction.

scientist/scientific-ontology-enrichment.name: scientific-ontology-enrichment
scientist/scientific-ontology-enrichment.description: Ontology enrichment skill. GO enrichment analysis, KEGG pathway enrichment, disease ontology enrichment, multiple testing correction, and enrichment visualization.

scientist/scientific-opentargets-genetic.name: scientific-opentargets-genetics
scientist/scientific-opentargets-genetic.description: Open Targets Genetics skill. GWAS trait-gene associations, L2G scoring, colocation analysis, and variant-to-gene mapping from Open Targets Genetics portal.

scientist/scientific-paleobiology.name: scientific-paleobiology
scientist/scientific-paleobiology.description: Paleobiology skill. Fossil record analysis, paleobiodiversity estimation, extinction rate calculation, stratigraphic data processing, and macroevolutionary pattern analysis.

scientist/scientific-paper-quality.name: scientific-paper-quality
scientist/scientific-paper-quality.description: Paper quality assessment skill. Manuscript quality scoring, structural completeness checking, statistical reporting assessment, and writing clarity evaluation.

scientist/scientific-parasite-genomics.name: scientific-parasite-genomics
scientist/scientific-parasite-genomics.description: Parasite genomics skill. Parasite genome analysis, drug resistance marker identification, population genetics of parasites, and host-parasite interaction genomics.

scientist/scientific-pathway-enrichment.name: scientific-pathway-enrichment
scientist/scientific-pathway-enrichment.description: Pathway enrichment skill. GSEA, ORA, KEGG/Reactome/WikiPathways enrichment, gene set analysis, leading-edge analysis, and pathway crosstalk identification.

scientist/scientific-pca-tsne.name: scientific-pca-tsne
scientist/scientific-pca-tsne.description: Dimensionality reduction skill. PCA, t-SNE, UMAP, MDS implementations with visualization, parameter tuning, and biological interpretation of reduced dimensions.

scientist/scientific-peer-review.name: scientific-peer-review
scientist/scientific-peer-review.description: Peer review skill. Structured peer review generation following journal guidelines, constructive critique formulation, statistical audit, and review scoring.

scientist/scientific-peer-review-respons.name: scientific-peer-review-response
scientist/scientific-peer-review-respons.description: Peer review response skill. Point-by-point response to reviewer comments, revision tracking, rebuttal letter drafting, and manuscript revision management.

scientist/scientific-perturbation-analys.name: scientific-perturbation-analysis
scientist/scientific-perturbation-analys.description: Perturbation analysis skill. CRISPR screen analysis, drug perturbation response, perturbation signature comparison, and connectivity map (CMap) analysis.

scientist/scientific-pharmacogenomics.name: scientific-pharmacogenomics
scientist/scientific-pharmacogenomics.description: Pharmacogenomics skill. Genotype-drug response associations, pharmacogenomic variant annotation, dosing guideline integration, and PGx biomarker analysis.

scientist/scientific-pharmacology-target.name: scientific-pharmacology-targets
scientist/scientific-pharmacology-target.description: Pharmacology targets skill. Target validation, druggability assessment, target prioritization scoring, and pharmacological target-disease mapping.

scientist/scientific-pharmacovigilance.name: scientific-pharmacovigilance
scientist/scientific-pharmacovigilance.description: Pharmacovigilance skill. Adverse event signal detection, FAERS/VAERS data analysis, disproportionality analysis, and drug safety signal evaluation.

scientist/scientific-pharmgkb-pgx.name: scientific-pharmgkb-pgx
scientist/scientific-pharmgkb-pgx.description: PharmGKB pharmacogenomics skill. PharmGKB clinical annotation queries, drug-gene interaction lookup, dosing guideline retrieval, and pharmacogenomic pathway analysis.

scientist/scientific-pharos-targets.name: scientific-pharos-targets
scientist/scientific-pharos-targets.description: Pharos targets skill. Target Development Level (TDL) classification, understudied protein identification, Illuminating the Druggable Genome (IDG) resource queries.

scientist/scientific-phylogenetics.name: scientific-phylogenetics
scientist/scientific-phylogenetics.description: Phylogenetics skill. Phylogenetic tree construction (ML/Bayesian), multiple sequence alignment, divergence time estimation, and evolutionary analysis pipelines.

scientist/scientific-pipeline-scaffold.name: scientific-pipeline-scaffold
scientist/scientific-pipeline-scaffold.description: Pipeline scaffold skill. Bioinformatics pipeline scaffolding with Snakemake/Nextflow, workflow configuration, reproducible analysis environment setup.

scientist/scientific-plant-biology.name: scientific-plant-biology
scientist/scientific-plant-biology.description: Plant biology skill. Plant genomics, transcriptomics, phenomics data analysis, crop improvement, and plant-specific database queries (TAIR, Phytozome).

scientist/scientific-population-genetics.name: scientific-population-genetics
scientist/scientific-population-genetics.description: Population genetics skill. Allele frequency analysis, Hardy-Weinberg testing, Fst/neutrality statistics, population structure (ADMIXTURE/PCA), and demographic inference.

scientist/scientific-precision-oncology.name: scientific-precision-oncology
scientist/scientific-precision-oncology.description: Precision oncology skill. Tumor molecular profiling, actionable mutation identification, treatment matching, clinical trial matching, and molecular tumor board support.

scientist/scientific-preprint-archive.name: scientific-preprint-archive
scientist/scientific-preprint-archive.description: Preprint archive skill. bioRxiv/medRxiv/arXiv search, preprint tracking, citation monitoring, and preprint-to-publication linking.

scientist/scientific-presentation-design.name: scientific-presentation-design
scientist/scientific-presentation-design.description: Presentation design skill. Scientific slide design, figure layout optimization, conference poster creation, and data visualization for oral presentations.

scientist/scientific-process-optimizatio.name: scientific-process-optimization
scientist/scientific-process-optimizatio.description: Process optimization skill. Industrial process optimization, response surface methodology, constraint optimization, and process parameter tuning pipelines.

scientist/scientific-protein-design.name: scientific-protein-design

scientist/scientific-protein-domain-fami.name: scientific-protein-domain-family

scientist/scientific-protein-interaction.name: scientific-protein-interaction-network

scientist/scientific-protein-structure-a.name: scientific-protein-structure-analysis

scientist/scientific-proteomics-mass-spe.name: scientific-proteomics-mass-spectrometry
scientist/scientific-proteomics-mass-spe.description: Proteomics and mass spectrometry skill. MS data processing, peptide identification, protein quantification (LFQ/TMT/iTRAQ), and proteomics statistical analysis.

scientist/scientific-public-health-data.name: scientific-public-health-data
scientist/scientific-public-health-data.description: Public health data skill. WHO/CDC/national health data retrieval, health indicator analysis, demographic health survey processing, and public health metric calculation.

scientist/scientific-publication-figures.name: scientific-publication-figures

scientist/scientific-quantum-computing.name: scientific-quantum-computing
scientist/scientific-quantum-computing.description: Quantum computing skill. Qiskit/Cirq quantum circuit design, VQE/QAOA algorithms, quantum chemistry simulation, and quantum machine learning experiments.

scientist/scientific-radiology-ai.name: scientific-radiology-ai

scientist/scientific-rare-disease-geneti.name: scientific-rare-disease-genetics

scientist/scientific-rcsb-pdb-search.name: scientific-rcsb-pdb-search
scientist/scientific-rcsb-pdb-search.description: RCSB PDB search skill. Protein Data Bank structure search, advanced query construction, structure clustering, and PDB data retrieval/parsing.

scientist/scientific-reactome-pathways.name: scientific-reactome-pathways
scientist/scientific-reactome-pathways.description: Reactome pathways skill. Reactome pathway queries, pathway hierarchy navigation, pathway enrichment analysis, and pathway diagram generation.

scientist/scientific-regulatory-genomics.name: scientific-regulatory-genomics
scientist/scientific-regulatory-genomics.description: Regulatory genomics skill. Enhancer/promoter annotation, transcription factor binding, regulatory variant analysis, and chromatin state classification.

scientist/scientific-regulatory-science.name: scientific-regulatory-science
scientist/scientific-regulatory-science.description: Regulatory science skill. FDA/EMA regulatory guidance, clinical trial regulation, drug approval pathway analysis, and regulatory document preparation.

scientist/scientific-reinforcement-learn.name: scientific-reinforcement-learning
scientist/scientific-reinforcement-learn.description: Reinforcement learning skill. Policy gradient methods, Q-learning, actor-critic architectures, environment design, reward shaping, and RL experiment management.

scientist/scientific-reproducible-report.name: scientific-reproducible-reporting
scientist/scientific-reproducible-report.description: Reproducible reporting skill. Jupyter/Quarto/R Markdown report automation, computational reproducibility, environment snapshot, and version-controlled analysis reports.

scientist/scientific-research-methodolog.name: scientific-research-methodology
scientist/scientific-research-methodolog.description: Research methodology skill. Study design planning, sampling strategy selection, measurement validity/reliability assessment, and methodological quality framework.

scientist/scientific-revision-tracker.name: scientific-revision-tracker
scientist/scientific-revision-tracker.description: Revision tracker skill. Manuscript revision tracking, diff generation between drafts, change log maintenance, and reviewer comment integration management.

scientist/scientific-rrna-taxonomy.name: scientific-rrna-taxonomy
scientist/scientific-rrna-taxonomy.description: rRNA taxonomy skill. 16S/18S/ITS rRNA-based taxonomic classification, OTU/ASV analysis, taxonomic database queries, and microbial diversity profiling.

scientist/scientific-scatac-signac.name: scientific-scatac-signac
scientist/scientific-scatac-signac.description: scATAC-seq Signac skill. Single-cell ATAC-seq analysis with Signac/ArchR, peak calling, motif enrichment, chromatin accessibility clustering, and gene activity scoring.

scientist/scientific-scientific-schemati.name: scientific-scientific-schematics
scientist/scientific-scientific-schemati.description: Scientific schematics skill. Pathway diagrams, mechanism illustrations, experimental workflow diagrams, and scientific concept visualization generation.

scientist/scientific-scvi-integration.name: scientific-scvi-integration

scientist/scientific-semantic-scholar.name: scientific-semantic-scholar
scientist/scientific-semantic-scholar.description: Semantic Scholar skill. Academic paper search via Semantic Scholar API, citation graph exploration, author profiling, and research impact metrics retrieval.

scientist/scientific-semi-supervised-lea.name: scientific-semi-supervised-learning
scientist/scientific-semi-supervised-lea.description: Semi-supervised learning skill. Self-training, co-training, label propagation, MixMatch/FixMatch, and semi-supervised model evaluation pipelines.

scientist/scientific-sequence-analysis.name: scientific-sequence-analysis
scientist/scientific-sequence-analysis.description: Sequence analysis skill. DNA/RNA/protein sequence alignment, motif discovery, sequence feature extraction, homology search, and sequence comparison tools.

scientist/scientific-single-cell-genomic.name: scientific-single-cell-genomics

scientist/scientific-spatial-multiomics.name: scientific-spatial-multiomics
scientist/scientific-spatial-multiomics.description: Spatial multi-omics skill. Spatially resolved transcriptomics + proteomics integration, spatial niche identification, and multi-modal spatial data analysis.

scientist/scientific-spatial-transcripto.name: scientific-spatial-transcriptomics
scientist/scientific-spatial-transcripto.description: Spatial transcriptomics skill. Visium/MERFISH/Slide-seq data analysis, spatial gene expression mapping, spatial clustering, and tissue region deconvolution.

scientist/scientific-spectral-signal.name: scientific-spectral-signal

scientist/scientific-squidpy-advanced.name: scientific-squidpy-advanced
scientist/scientific-squidpy-advanced.description: Squidpy advanced skill. Spatial omics analysis with Squidpy: neighborhood enrichment, spatial autocorrelation, ligand-receptor analysis, and image feature extraction.

scientist/scientific-statistical-simulat.name: scientific-statistical-simulation
scientist/scientific-statistical-simulat.description: Statistical simulation skill. Monte Carlo methods, bootstrap confidence intervals, permutation tests, power simulation, and simulation-based inference.

scientist/scientific-statistical-testing.name: scientific-statistical-testing
scientist/scientific-statistical-testing.description: Statistical testing skill. Frequentist hypothesis testing (t-test, ANOVA, chi-square, nonparametric tests), multiple testing correction, effect size calculation, and power analysis.

scientist/scientific-stitch-chemical-net.name: scientific-stitch-chemical-network

scientist/scientific-streaming-analytics.name: scientific-streaming-analytics

scientist/scientific-string-network-api.name: scientific-string-network-api
scientist/scientific-string-network-api.description: STRING network API skill. Protein-protein interaction network queries, functional enrichment via STRING, network clustering, and PPI confidence scoring.

scientist/scientific-structural-proteomi.name: scientific-structural-proteomics
scientist/scientific-structural-proteomi.description: Structural proteomics skill. Cross-linking mass spectrometry analysis, HDX-MS data processing, native MS, and structural biology data integration.

scientist/scientific-supplementary-gener.name: scientific-supplementary-generator
scientist/scientific-supplementary-gener.description: Supplementary materials generator skill. Supplementary data preparation, extended methods writing, supplementary table/figure organization, and SI document formatting.

scientist/scientific-survival-clinical.name: scientific-survival-clinical

scientist/scientific-symbolic-mathematic.name: scientific-symbolic-mathematics
scientist/scientific-symbolic-mathematic.description: Symbolic mathematics skill. SymPy-based symbolic computation, equation solving, calculus, linear algebra, and mathematical proof assistance.

scientist/scientific-systematic-review.name: scientific-systematic-review
scientist/scientific-systematic-review.description: Systematic review skill. PRISMA-compliant systematic review workflow, literature screening, data extraction, risk of bias assessment, and evidence synthesis.

scientist/scientific-systems-biology.name: scientific-systems-biology
scientist/scientific-systems-biology.description: Systems biology skill. Network modeling, flux balance analysis, dynamical systems simulation, and multi-scale biological system analysis.

scientist/scientific-text-mining-nlp.name: scientific-text-mining-nlp
scientist/scientific-text-mining-nlp.description: Text mining and NLP skill. Scientific text mining, named entity recognition, relation extraction, topic modeling, and biomedical NLP pipelines.

scientist/scientific-time-series.name: scientific-time-series
scientist/scientific-time-series.description: Time series analysis skill. Trend decomposition, stationarity testing, ARIMA/SARIMA modeling, spectral analysis, and time series feature extraction.

scientist/scientific-time-series-forecas.name: scientific-time-series-forecasting
scientist/scientific-time-series-forecas.description: Time series forecasting skill. Prophet/NeuralProphet/LSTM forecasting, ensemble forecasting, forecast evaluation metrics, and confidence interval estimation.

scientist/scientific-toxicology-env.name: scientific-toxicology-env
scientist/scientific-toxicology-env.description: Toxicology and environmental skill. Toxicity prediction, dose-response modeling, environmental risk assessment, and chemical hazard characterization.

scientist/scientific-transfer-learning.name: scientific-transfer-learning

scientist/scientific-uncertainty-quantif.name: scientific-uncertainty-quantification
scientist/scientific-uncertainty-quantif.description: Uncertainty quantification skill. Aleatory/epistemic uncertainty estimation, ensemble uncertainty, conformal prediction, calibration, and uncertainty propagation.

scientist/scientific-uniprot-proteome.name: scientific-uniprot-proteome
scientist/scientific-uniprot-proteome.description: UniProt proteome skill. UniProt protein sequence/annotation retrieval, proteome-wide queries, functional annotation extraction, and protein feature analysis.

scientist/scientific-variant-effect-pred.name: scientific-variant-effect-prediction
scientist/scientific-variant-effect-pred.description: Variant effect prediction skill. CADD/REVEL/AlphaMissense scoring, splice variant prediction, regulatory variant impact, and variant pathogenicity classification.

scientist/scientific-variant-interpretat.name: scientific-variant-interpretation
scientist/scientific-variant-interpretat.description: Variant interpretation skill. ACMG/AMP variant classification, pathogenicity evidence aggregation, clinical significance assessment, and variant report generation.

agent-skills-builder.name: agent-skills-builder
agent-skills-builder.description: Builder skill that designs and generates Agent Skills compliant packages through user dialogue. Discovers the true objective behind surface-level requests, then designs, generates, validates, and distributes skill configurations for GitHub Copilot CLI and related runtimes.
